title: Onboarding - Continue as guest
scenario: Onboarding 'Continue as guest' flow shows additional location and passcode prompts on iOS before reaching home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the License Agreement when prompted.
3. On the onboarding screen, tap 'Skip' or 'Continue' to proceed.
4. Tap 'Continue as guest' to skip account login.
5. (Android) When prompted, tap 'Allow' or 'Don't Allow' for app permissions.
6. (Android) The 'Poly Product Improvement Program' popup appears. Dismiss it.
7. (Android) Verify the Home screen is displayed.
8. (iOS) When prompted, grant or deny Location permission.
9. (iOS) When prompted, enter or skip the iPhone passcode.
10. (iOS) Verify the Home screen is displayed.
expected: After completing the guest onboarding flow, the user lands on the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
